records.title: Total Blackout Sleep Mask with Built-In Bluetooth | Sleep Deep
records.description: This 3D sleep mask blocks every trace of light without pressing on your eyes. Built-in Bluetooth means you can drift off to sleep sounds or podcasts without tangled wires.

records.title: Block Out Light and Drift Off with Built-In Bluetooth Audio
records.description: The 3D shell sits clear of your eyes — no pressure, no gaps. Pairs over Bluetooth so you get your sleep sounds without wires or separate earbuds in the dark.

records.title: Blocks All Light: Sleep Mask with Bluetooth Built In
records.description: Shaped to keep fabric off your lids while sealing out every source of light. Add the Bluetooth function and it's a solid wind-down kit without the wire clutter.

records.title: Wind Down Easier with a Bluetooth Sleep Mask | 3D Blackout
records.description: Block out the room and pipe in your sleep sounds or guided meditation — no phone screen, no separate earbuds, just darkness and audio for an easier wind-down.

records.title: Calm Your Mind at Bedtime with Blackout and Bluetooth
records.description: Pair with sleep sounds or a meditation app and let the 3D blackout mask do the rest. No wires, no eye pressure — just a darker, quieter path to sleep.

records.title: Quieter Bedtime: Blackout Sleep Mask with Bluetooth
records.description: 3D shell keeps pressure off your lids while built-in Bluetooth handles your sleep playlist or meditation. Useful kit for anyone whose brain won't switch off.

records.title: Stays Put All Night: Sleep Mask for Restless Sleepers
records.description: The 3D shell holds its position whether you roll or shift — no light gaps, no eye pressure. Bluetooth built in for your sleep sounds without tangled wires.

records.title: Stays Put Through Every Toss and Turn | 3D Blackout Mask
records.description: Contoured to keep the mask in place through the night — no gaps, no slipping. The 3D structure also keeps fabric off your eyes so nothing digs in when you shift.

records.title: No More Slipping Masks: 3D Blackout Sleep Mask for Restless Sleepers
records.description: Designed to sit clear of your eyes and seal out light from any position. Built-in Bluetooth makes it easy to fall back asleep to your favourite sounds mid-night.
